headline: **MLB Daily Recap: May 16, 2026**
article:
The Philadelphia Phillies took a thrilling 11-9 victory over the Pittsburgh Pirates, led by Kyle Schwarber's 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs. The Washington Nationals secured a 3-2 win over the Baltimore Orioles, with Zack Littell earning the win after 5.0 innings of scoreless relief. The Detroit Tigers edged out the Toronto Blue Jays 3-2, with Andrés Giménez leading the Blue Jays with 2 RBI.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Ben Joyce (Los Angeles Angels) who was placed on the 60-day injured list due to right shoulder inflammation. Trevor Story (Boston Red Sox) was placed on the 10-day injured list retroactive to May 15, 2026, with a sports hernia. Clay Holmes (New York Mets) was placed on the 15-day injured list with a right fibula fracture. Max Fried (New York Yankees) was placed on the 15-day injured list retroactive to May 14, 2026, with a left elbow bone bruise.

The Chicago White Sox acquired Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for LHP Jackson Nove. The Athletics also traded RHP Kyle Robinson to the Pittsburgh Pirates for 2B Alika Williams, and RHP Eduarniel Núñez to the Baltimore Orioles for cash. The Seattle Mariners traded LHP José Suarez to the Athletics for cash.

top_news.title: **Phillies Take Thrilling 11-9 Victory Over Pirates**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies outlasted the Pittsburgh Pirates in a high-scoring matchup, winning 11-9. Kyle Schwarber led the Phillies' offense with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Take Down Orioles in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals secured a 3-2 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Zack Littell earning the win after 5.0 innings of scoreless relief. Daylen Lile led the Orioles' offense with 3 hits, including a home run, while Richard Lovelady earned the save.

top_news.title: **Tigers Take Down Blue Jays in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers edged out the Toronto Blue Jays 3-2 in a closely contested game. Andrés Giménez led the Blue Jays with 2 RBI, while Trey Yesavage pitched 6 strong innings for the Blue Jays, striking out 6 and allowing 2 ER.

top_news.title: **Reds Edge Guardians in Thrilling 7-6 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds secured a hard-fought win over the Cleveland Guardians, outlasting their opponents by a single run. Matt McLain led the Reds' offense with a strong performance, notching 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Edge Tigers in Thrilling 2-1 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays secured a narrow win over the Detroit Tigers, with a final score of 2-1. Impact hitters for the Blue Jays included Yohendrick Piñango, Daulton Varsho, Kevin McGonigle, and Matt Vierling.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Royals 4-2**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 2-4 victory over the Kansas City Royals, with Jac Caglianone, Nathan Church, and Victor Scott II making notable contributions for the winning team. Matt Strahm took the loss for the Royals.

top_news.title: **Ben Joyce Placed on 60-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Los Angeles Angels right-handed pitcher Ben Joyce has been placed on the 60-day injured list due to right shoulder inflammation. This move is a status change for the team.

top_news.title: **White Sox Acquire Junior Perez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Chicago White Sox have acquired center fielder Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for left-handed pitcher Jackson Nove.
